programme.desc: Feeling Chowder's been spending too long in the kitchen, Mung forces him to play with the other kids. Beset by kisses and taunts, he tries to escape.

programme.title: E11 - Am I Blue?

programme.title: E18 - Safety Last
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: Triads The Inside Story
programme.desc: Hung Hing Family boss Lee Qun was ambushed on his way to Macau. His heir Lee Mun-ho flew back from the States for the funeral. Mun-ho, who did not want to mingle with the mobsters, planned to return to the States for good after wrapping up his father's business in Hong Kong. However, through his intelligence and managerial skills, he turned Hung Hing into a well organized business structure. On the other hand, Yeung Kong, a young and ambitious mobster who was brought up under the old Triad tradition, strongly opposed Mun-ho...

programme.title: Fruit Punch
programme.desc: Five young men threw themselves with heart and soul into the work force. They have different approaches and different life styles. Ah Kit is the hardworking investment broker. He is so busy making money. Ah Chi is a postman believing in fung shui. Ah Hark is an apprentice in his family jewelry shop and Ah Wai failed in public exam. Ah Ming is the most unconventional of the five. Working in a Japanese restaurant. The five start a laundry shop which soon folds. Next, they try something new to save their business. Ah Ming leads a carefree life which dismays his girl, Yoko. Ah Hark's girlfriend Cat will move to Australia and leave him soon. Ah Ming and Ah Hark are going to lose their girlfriends. The five new generation are going their own ways...

programme.title: The Accidental Spy
programme.desc: Buck trails two suspicious men and jumps into action to foil their plans. Soon after he meets Liu, who convinces Buck that he may be the long-lost son of a rich korean businessman...

programme.title: E479
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E385
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: Ideas To Protect Ourselves From Disasters
programme.desc: Introduce selected news and other information programs related to disasters and reconstructions with experts' comments. The program also focuses on ongoing projects to protect communities from disasters.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A rumor emerges that a prestigious medical university has been lowering female applicants' exam scores. Reporter Hiba Kikuno (Matsumoto Wakana) begins investigating and zeroes in on board member Kanbayashi Harumi (Suzuki Honami), who deftly deflects every inquiry. As Hiba pushes closer to the truth, the two women - each shaped by injustices in a male‑dominated society - find their convictions in direct conflict. This social drama portrays women who confront systemic unfairness while pursuing their own hopes for happiness.

Part 4
programme.desc: In this program, we explore incredible but true stories hidden in the NHK Archives through a quiz format-behind-the-scenes of early popular shows and classic dramas, astonishing facts surrounding Apollo 11's moon landing and the world's first satellite broadcast, and a viewer-participation program of the time that is unimaginable today.

programme.title: E94
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: Urban Foraging - Fresh, Tasty And Free
programme.desc: More and more city dwellers are collecting food in the asphalt jungle. They harvest herbs by the roadside and grow wild vegetables in cracks in the concrete. For these modern foragers and hunters, the food is free, tasty and more varied than in the supermarket.

programme.title: Electric Mobility: From Ethiopia To The Premium Ev Market
programme.desc: Addis Ababa is expanding electric buses and taxis to cut costs and modernize transport, but the transition faces structural challenges. Plus: we review the DS N°8 and its place among high-end electric cars.

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: A 30-year-old woman suddenly has a new father who is three years younger than her. With time, she accepts him as a family; he always takes her side and loves her unconditionally. What would happen to them?

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: K-pop Idols Meet the World! A one-of-a-kind K-pop entertainment show where idols experience global cultures and connect with fans worldwide.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: Peppa loses her shoes, but she gets new red ones. Now she is so happy in them, that she refuses to take them off.

programme.title: E503 - The Island Of Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Somewhere, on The Island of Lost Treasure, there are incredible riches just waiting to be discovered. And Blaze and Darington are determined to be the first to find them!

programme.title: E105 - Friendaversary Adventure / Swiper's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: E251 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: E303 - Pedro's Cough
programme.desc: Pedro gets a contagious cough at daycare and other children soon catch it. When it's time to go the grown-ups catch it too, including Madame Gazelle. Doctor Brown Bear gives them terrible-tasting medicine, but who will look after him when he is sick?

programme.title: E15 - Pig Gets Big
programme.desc: Farmer Jackson was just trying to grow some giant tomatoes, but he wound up with a giant pig! Now, Mojo and Bo have to get Felix back to normal size before Swoppiton gets stomped.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E37 - Mars Mission, Chile
programme.desc: Xuli and Foz help NASA after a close encounter with a UFO makes them lose the Mars Rover.

programme.title: E8 - Daddy Dropoff
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: E33 - The Island Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: E45 - Seaside
programme.desc: Myrtle, Sophie and Benjamin call Stanley to teach them how to make a sandcastle. Myrtle asks for a bigger one, so big it turns into a sandcastle resort!

programme.title: E3 - I'm An Actual Ninja You Know
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.desc: After playing with her toy dinosaurs, JoJo decides she would love to see a real one. Gran Gran takes JoJo to the museum to see a fossilised skeleton of a Tyrannosaurus rex!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC's flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia's business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E1 - Rock'n Flight
programme.desc: Al Comet, alias Alain Monod, is a former member of the Young Gods, pioneers of electro industrial music. At 65, he traded his electric guitar for an Indian sitar. And when he is not giving concerts, it is in the air that he practices his other passion, aerial acrobatics.

programme.title: E4 - Vise
programme.desc: Located along the Meuse River, Vise offers an ideal setting for walkers. It includes: Argenteau, Cheratte, Lanaye, Lixhe-Loen and Richelle. Among the highlights: the town hall, a jewel of Mosan Renaissance architecture, its marina, and the Collegiate Church of Saint Martin.

programme.title: E5 - Champagne: Land Of Excellence
programme.desc: Pascal Bourguignon photographs the classified vineyards of the Marne Valley; the Michelin-starred chef Arnaud Lallement opens the doors to his kitchen; Elsa Berthelot continues the age-old tradition of the ''Compagnons du Devoir''; Champagne Avenue in Epernay, provides a showcase for the world's most prestigious wine merchants...

programme.title: E7 - Noni, The Tree With A Thousand Virtues
programme.desc: In Maupiti as well as in Taravao, noni is cultivated. This shrub, typical of the Polynesian islands, has a bad reputation because of its fruit's unbearable smell. Yet it is used for its antibiotic and antioxidant properties in medicine and also in cooking, when its juice is extracted.

programme.title: E4 - Like A Fish In Water/Identical Cousins
programme.desc: With his large moustache and beanie, you can't fail to recognise Denis Junod. At 70 he continues to lift his fishing nets, every day, near Auvernier. Gaelle is a property broker and photographer, Carlyn an opera singer. Their passion for music and nature has created a timeless bond between them...

programme.title: E87
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E6 - Deployer Les Moyens Pour Faire Briller Tout Un Village
programme.desc: A businessman shows us around the Garneau saddle room, which he restored for the benefit of his home town. We also discover a windmill put back into use by the local community. And close-up look at a talented art carpenter.

programme.title: E55 - Franco Brazilian Brunch In Eysines
programme.desc: In Eysines, near Bordeaux, Alessandra Montagne meets Elaine, the manager of a bakery mill. She highlights both local products and her Brazilian roots. On today's menu: creamy coffee flan and pao de queijo, small cheese puffs.

programme.title: E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

Agni Sakshi
programme.desc: Newly married Suraj and Shivangi are on honeymoon where they meet Vishwanath - who claims that Shivangi is his wife.

programme.title: Kahan Shuru Kahan Khatam
programme.desc: A woman rejects her arranged marriage, sparking a chaotic chase as she tries to escape the wedding, while the groom and his family try to catch her.

programme.title: Patthar Ke Phool
programme.desc: A young police officer and the daughter of a gangster fall in love at first sight.

programme.title: E22 - Thank You, Mommy!
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids. Come along and be part of their fun everyday adventures.

programme.title: E10 - Mommy’s Proud Day
programme.desc: Its Little Angel! Where baby John, his brother, Jack, and sister, Jill inspire kids and families to have fun and to grow and learn through play. Come sing along!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.desc: Simone and Carter get trapped in the tropics while hunting down a suspect on the run.

programme.title: E379 - Skull Of Discord/Lemming Fortune/Tough Medicine/Tai Chi Lemmings/Domestic Shaolin/Pea
programme.desc: After stealing Grizzy's jar of Yummy chocolate spread, the Lemmings propel the bear far from the log cabin. Grizzy lands in a temple where he finds a crystal skull which gives you the power to cause chaos.

programme.title: Lego Scooby-Doo! Blowout Beach Bash E1 -Lego Scooby-doo! Blowout Beach Bash
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo! and his pals Fred, Daphne, Velma and Shaggy are no strangers to solving spooky mysteries filled with all types of ghouls and goblins. This time is no different. As Scooby-Doo! and his friends are on their way to Blowout Beach for a real swinging beach party in the Mystery Machine, the Ghost Pirates threaten to ruin the gang's good vibes. It is up to Scooby and the gang to get the party back on track, without missing a beat.

programme.title: E118 - The Catfish/The Cycle/The Stars/The Box/The Grades
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin realise Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, they feel bad. So they create one - called Muriel. However when Granny Jojo finds out Louie has been spending time online with another 'woman', Muriel not existing isn't going to stop her being destroyed.

programme.title: E147 - Can't Go Back/A Single Pale Rose/Legs From Here To Homeworld
programme.desc: Ronaldo spots something mysterious on the moon, and Steven goes to investigate.

programme.title: E7 - Death Punchies/Rage Against The Tv/Gut Model/A Bunch Of Full Grown Geese/The Heart Of
programme.desc: Tired of Mordecai always beating him at punchies and getting his way, Rigby decides to learn the martial art of 'Death Kwon Do'.

programme.title: E357 - Mini Troubles/For Peanuts/Within Snout's Reach/Safari Express/False Children/Game Of
programme.desc: To recover the jar of Yummy that Grizzy confiscated from them, the Lemmings decide to infest the bear's coat with fleas.

programme.title: E138 - Nip And Duck / Telephone Pole Gag 2: Circular Fan / Asphalt And Battery/Lesson Plan 9

programme.title: E1 - A. Spike Gets Skooled/Cats Ruffled Furniture
programme.desc: Tom gets Spike sent to obedience school, and Jerry is left without a protector. When Spike returns, Tom tries hard to get Spike to revert to his old ways, but Jerry fights back.

programme.title: E136 - Wanda's Apprentice/Top Dog!/Red Card For Wanda
programme.desc: Wanda trains a young sheep to better protect the flock from Wolf – she's a disciplined taskmaster! Wanting to help out, Trico keeps interrupting her lessons with his gadgets. The young apprentice is soon dazzled by Trico’s easier methods…

The Enchanted Forest
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers explore the largest evergreen moist forest in South Africa, in Garden Route National Park. Along the way they go zip lining, find a massive tree and spot signs of the legendary Knysna elephants.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hidden Gem
programme.desc: When Addison and Tess find a note in a funny old pair of rummage sale pants, they think they may have found a clue to lead them to a stash of priceless hidden diamonds!

programme.title: The Mystery of the The Number 1 Mean Girls Detective Agency
programme.desc: When the school mean girls, Katie and Dinara, start their own detective agency and solve a rash of neighbourhood mysteries before Addison can, she wonders if she's lost her touch...or if there is something else more nefarious going on.

programme.title: Seashell
programme.desc: Bring the beach closer to you with these DIY activities!

programme.title: Blue Gold
programme.desc: In the Sahara desert, the MeteoHeroes are battling a sandstorm while figuring out what is causing the oases to dry up.

programme.title: Cat Maze
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat maze.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: The Nektons find the Dark Orca pirate submarine completely deserted! But why? And what are those mysterious, ghostly sounds?

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy fall out over some fireworks Robbie has bought. With Robbie covered in white powder from an accidental explosion, and Flippy pretending he doesn't exist, Albert is convinced Robbie is a ghost that only he can see.

programme.title: It's a Bird! It's a Fish! It's a Metamorphosis!
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric turns a bird turn into a fish! In order to understand his shape- shifting trick, we learn all about Escher's metamorphosis: the illusion of one animal slowly transforming into another, line by line.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Fat
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors look at body fat and show how it can keep you warm!

programme.title: Where is Maths in Time?
programme.desc: Maths has helped us measure time and dates in different ways through the ages, from using the sun to calculate the time to using the lines of longitude to divide the earth into time zones.

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: Bottle Cap
programme.desc: Small yet that doesn't stop our DIY geniuses from coming up with something fun.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Elephant - Crush
programme.desc: The elephant accidentally stands on a flower and is upset that he has crushed the innocent thing. He does everything he can to revive the flower, but things get worse before they get better. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Medicine in The Middle Ages
programme.desc: Falling sick in the Middle Ages is not a good idea! Dove has trouble finding a cure for Little Lewis when he falls ill. A consultation takes us on a tour of the wacky techniques and beliefs, along with typical treatments used in medieval times.

programme.title: Self-portrait
programme.desc: Draw what you see, not what you think.

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: Who's Getting Snotted?
programme.desc: There's a snot-tastic dose of Ouchology as the doctors face tough medical questions, and a VIP guest is due in the lab to help explain why DNA is a funny, twisty shape. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Jan has cut his eyebrow, and Lennox has hurt his knee.

programme.title: Mars or Bust
programme.desc: Can we really go to Mars? The team blasts off, and before you know it, they're exploring Mars while Fico and Oto go looking for the lander. But the two are stunned to see a space-suited Martian take the lander inside his house!

programme.title: Exoplanets
programme.desc: The discovery of exoplanets outside our solar system opened up a universe of possibilities – and we have never been closer to finding Earth's twin than we are today. Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the fascinating world of exoplanets.

programme.title: Who's Getting Snotted?
programme.desc: There's a snot-tastic dose of Ouchology as the doctors face tough medical questions, and a VIP guest is due in the lab to help explain why DNA is a funny, twisty shape. Meanwhile, in the Emergency Department, Jan has cut his eyebrow, and Lennox has hurt his knee.

programme.title: Bouncing Back
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Acrobatic Men's Four are invited to trials for the World Championships - but when it comes to costumes for the day, they realise their performance on the floor is not their only concern!

programme.title: When Friends and Family Have Your Back
programme.desc: It's all changed for synchro trampoline gymnastic pair Alannah and Morgan, who have had to split as a pair because they are jumping at different heights. Morgan has been given a lovely new partner, Evie, but Alannah is still waiting for a new partner.

programme.title: Fearless Junior Vets
programme.desc: The fearless Junior Vets get in the shark tank, and dogs Boris and Red have surgery to help them go walkies. And Jane, the grey seal, is in bad shape after swimming into some fishing wire.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: Bottle Cap
programme.desc: Small yet that doesn't stop our DIY geniuses from coming up with something fun.

programme.title: Whodunnit?
programme.desc: When Darwin's precious Manaia goes missing, he and Newts become detectives for the day to find it.

programme.title: Where is Maths in Time?
programme.desc: Maths has helped us measure time and dates in different ways through the ages, from using the sun to calculate the time to using the lines of longitude to divide the earth into time zones.

programme.title: E14 - It Was Our Anniversary, Man!
programme.desc: One man's laundry list of traffic violations haunts him while another struggles to find someone to bail him out before his anniversary ends. In Modesto, a man faces felony charges for a very unique charge.

programme.title: E10 - Kids Who Kill - Stephen Hough
programme.desc: Stephen Hough got away with raping and killing 16-year-old Janet Cummings. He fabricated an alibi for his crimes and let an innocent man go to jail. Four decades later, detectives made a breakthrough.

programme.title: E158
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused murderer escapes from the courthouse; a teenager goes on trial for robbing a 9-year-old selling Girl Scout cookies; and more.

programme.title: E7 - Illegal Gamblers
programme.desc: From Taiwan to Singapore, addicted gamblers bet on anything and everything, with ruthless bookies using extortion to ensure payment.

programme.title: E5 - A Krazy Killing
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: E4 - Know Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Early on Sunday morning, Detective Tanisha Sykes Smith responds to a man found deceased from multiple gunshot wounds alongside a building in the Lower 9th Ward.

programme.title: E10 - 爆閃一家人 爆笑過大年
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E4 - 開啟名畫修復任務
programme.desc: 邀請了馬清運、伊能靜、楊芸晴等嘉賓擔任「超腦護航員」；節目根據“八大未來力”的概念來進行項目設置，少年們需要用創造性思維激發想像力，利用從紙筆到程式設計來破解難題，從而喚醒大腦活力，選拔出最具“未來力”的少年。

programme.title: E13 - 張智霖古巨基難抉擇
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E5 - Indonesia - Amazon of the Seas
programme.desc: The Indonesian archipelago lies in the heart of the Coral Triangle, a region of the ocean recognized worldwide as the center of marine biodiversity. With the highest number of coral and fish species on earth, Indonesia has the richest reefs on the planet - but these reefs are under threat...

programme.title: E3 - Aerial Hunters
programme.desc: Australia’s birds of prey are some of the region's fiercest predators. These highly specialised killers are powerful, resourceful and striking; they use some impressive weapons to survive. This is the story of Australia’s aerial hunters.

programme.title: E2 - Hunting with the Manzi
programme.desc: Run into a lion-hyena showdown with Julz as he hunts for the elusive Manzi pack, who are missing four of their precious pups. Then join Henry from the Zambian Carnivore Programme on a house call to the Kakumbi den, where another pup has gone AWOL.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E3 - A Busy Bay
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Marina Bay, where the Nomads and Townies are squatting while Anna and the Bay Family are away upriver. Soak up the peaceful otter life in this luxurious waterway before the surprise early return of its rightful owners.

programme.title: E4 - Hunkering Down
programme.desc: Winter is coming, and the animals take advantage of autumn’s final bounty before the cold, barren months ahead. Watch some creatures search for respite indoors, while others arrive from far northern climates to settle in the ploughed fields.

programme.title: E4 - The Feathering Nest
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species, and in this episode we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life. Wherever they live, these birds have got their work cut out, holding their territory against invaders, attracting and winning partners and safeguarding their chicks.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E1 - Mom Gone Wild
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: E1 - Mom Gone Wild
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: E6 - Surviving Gaza, Seeking Truth
programme.desc: Filmmaker Patrick Abboud meets frontline Palestinian journalists who risked everything to document the truth of Gaza. Now safe in Australia, they reveal extraordinary new evidence of the continued killing of journalists.

programme.title: E7 - Ice Cream
programme.desc: Dr Karl gets the scoop on how two of our most popular ice creams are made. Australians each devour around 18 litres of ice cream a year, making us the third largest population of ice cream eaters on the planet.

programme.title: E59 - Round 9 - Richmond V Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.desc: Xyz, Chloe and Marlley face personal challenges as the school year begins, and must leave boarding school and return home; Jaycee travels home to her Aboriginal mission in regional Victoria.

programme.desc: Dr Karl gets the scoop on how two of our most popular ice creams are made. Australians each devour around 18 litres of ice cream a year, making us the third largest population of ice cream eaters on the planet.

programme.desc: In his final years, Australian eye surgeon Fred Hollows trained Vietnamese doctors in modern cataract surgery. Decades on, they and their students continue his mission, restoring sight to those who might otherwise go without.

E2 - [Vd] Episode 2
programme.desc: Two years after Walk the Line tracked a group of Chinese migrants' perilous journey across Latin America to reach the US, CNA correspondent Wei Du returns to America to check in with the Chinese migrants and see how they are carrying on with their American dream.

programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.
